cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.20)

if(CMAKE_VERSION VERSION_GREATER_EQUAL "3.30")
    cmake_policy(SET CMP0167 NEW)
endif()

project(Nova2D VERSION 0.1.0 LANGUAGES CXX)

set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD 17)
set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD_REQUIRED ON)
set(CMAKE_CXX_EXTENSIONS OFF)

list(APPEND CMAKE_MODULE_PATH "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/cmake")
include(CompilerWarnings)

# Include platform hints generated by setup script (e.g. Homebrew prefix on macOS)
if(EXISTS "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/cmake/BrewHints.cmake")
    include("${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/cmake/BrewHints.cmake")
endif()

set(CMAKE_RUNTIME_OUTPUT_DIRECTORY "${CMAKE_BINARY_DIR}/bin")
set(CMAKE_LIBRARY_OUTPUT_DIRECTORY "${CMAKE_BINARY_DIR}/lib")
set(CMAKE_ARCHIVE_OUTPUT_DIRECTORY "${CMAKE_BINARY_DIR}/lib")

find_package(SDL2      REQUIRED)
find_package(spdlog    REQUIRED)
find_package(Catch2    REQUIRED)

add_subdirectory(engine)
add_subdirectory(game)

enable_testing()
add_subdirectory(tests)
